name: analysing-har
description: Analyse and debug HAR (HTTP Archive) captures with wiretrail: one-shot smart analysis (`auto`), ranked root-cause diagnosis, request storms, wasteful duplicates vs retries, 4xx/5xx errors, slow calls, auth/JWT/token-refresh flows, rate limits, body search/extract, regression diff against a baseline, and what differs between repeated calls. Redacts secrets by default. Wraps wiretrail with auto-install instructions.
